On that day the Messenger of Allah ﷺ informed his Companions of the martyrdom of Khubaib. Later on, when some disbelievers from Quraish were informed that 'Asim had been martyred, they sent some people to fetch a significant part of his body to ascertain his death. (This was because) 'Asim had killed one of their chiefs. So Allah sent a swarm of wasps, resembling a shady cloud, to hover over the body of 'Asim and to shield him from their messengers, and thus they could not cut off anything from his body..
iwh_id: Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ sent an espionage mission of ten men under the leadership of 'Asim bin Thabit Al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu). They proceeded till they tiba di Al-Had'ah, a place antara 'Usfan dan Makkah dan the news of their arrival tiba di a section dari tribe of Hudhail, called Banu Lihyan. About one hundred men, yang sedang all archers, hurried to follow their tracks. When 'A sim dan his companions datang kepada mengetahui of their pursuers, they membawa refuge di safe place. The infidels encircled them dan bersabda kepada mereka,: "Come down dan surrender, dan kami promise dan guarantee you that we tidak akan kill anyone of you." 'Asim bin Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "By Allah! I tidak akan come down to be under the protection of disbelievers. Ya Allah! convey this news to our Prophet (ﷺ)." Kemudian the infidels shot arrows at them till they killed 'Asim. Three men datang down relying on their promise dan covenant. They were Khubaib, Zaid bin Ad-Dathinah dan another man. When the disbelievers captured them, they tied them up dengan strings of their bows. The third dari captives berkata: "This is the beginning of pertama betrayal. By Allah! I tidak akan go with you. I have a baik example in these (martyrs)." Jadi they dragged him dan tried to compel him to accompany them, namun ia refused. At terakhir they killed him. They membawa Khubaib and Zaid bin Ad- Dathina with them dan sold them as slaves in Makkah. This incident membawa place setelah the battle of Badr.Khubaib was bought oleh sons of Al-Harith bin 'Amir bin Naufal bin 'Abd Manaf. It was Khubaib yang telah killed Al-Harith di battle of Badr. Khubaib remained a prisoner with those orang-orang untuk few days till the sons of Al-Harith resolved to kill him.When Khubaib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) got wind of this plot, he borrowed a razor from one of Al- Harith's daughters untuk melepas his pubic hair. Her little son crawled kepada Khubaib because of her carelessness. Later on, ia melihat putranya on his thigh dan the razor was in his hand. She got scared jadi much that Khubaib noticed the agitation on her face dan berkata: "Are you afraid that I will kill him? No, I will never do that." She later remarked (setelah Al-Khubaib got martyred): "By Allah! I never melihat a prisoner better than Khubaib." She added: "By Allah! Saya melihat him once eating dari bunch of grapes in his hand sementara he was chained dan there was no such fruit at that time in Makkah. Probably it was a boon which Allah bestowed upon Khubaib."Ketika mereka membawa him out dari Haram of Makkah to kill him outside its boundaries, Khubaib requested them to hendaklah ia offer two Rak'ah of voluntary shalat. They allowed him dan ia offered two Rak'ah shalat. Kemudian he berkata: "Had I not apprehended that you would berpikir that I was afraid of death, I would have prolonged the shalat. Ya Allah! Count their number; slay them one by one dan spare not one of them." He kemudian recited these poetic verses:'I jangan care how they kill me as panjang as I get martyred di Cause of Allah as a Muslim. I received my death for Allah's sake. If Allah jadi desires, He will bless, the amputated limbs dari torn body.'Kemudian putra Al-Harith killed him. It was Khubaib yang set the tradition for any Muslim sentenced to death in captivity to offer two Rak'ah of voluntary shalat. On that day Rasulullah ﷺ informed para sahabatnya dari martyrdom of Khubaib. Later on, when some disbelievers from Quraish were informed that 'Asim had been martyred, they sent some orang-orang to fetch a significant part of his body to ascertain his death. (This was because) 'Asim had killed one of their chiefs. Jadi Allah sent a swarm of wasps, resembling a shady cloud, to hover over the body of 'Asim dan to shield him from their messengers, and dengan demikian they tidak bisa cut off apa pun from his body..

sunnah_ref_en: Ibn 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with them) reported: I never heard 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with him) relating anything that he conceived it to be so-and-so, but that it proved to be as he had conceived it.".
iwh_en: Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that i never heard 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) relating anything that he conceived it to be so-and-so, but that it proved to be as he had conceived it.".
iwh_id: Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa i never heard 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) relating anything that he conceived it to be jadi-and-jadi, namun that it proved to be as he had conceived it.".
